zh.lifeSummary: Lady Elizabeth Grey是Edward Grey 1st Viscount Lisle和Elizabeth TALBOT的女兒，於1470年出生在英國英格蘭素可。她於大約1500年與Edmund Dudley Esq.在英國波藍德結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世於1525年6月享年55歲，埋葬在英國哈普爾鐵費爾德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Lady Elizabeth Grey是Edward Grey 1st Viscount Lisle和Elizabeth TALBOT的女儿，于1470年出生在英国英格兰素可。她于大约1500年与Edmund Dudley Esq.在英国波藍德结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。她去世于1525年6月享年55岁，埋葬在英国哈普爾鐵費爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Grey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish: variant of   Gray  .
In some cases also an American shortened and altered form of Ukrainian Grushko: nickname or topographic name derived from a Russian-influenced transliteration of grushka ‘pear, pear tree’.

variants.name: Gray
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish (especially Eastern Ulster; of Norman origin): habitational name from Graye in Calvados, France, named from the Gallo-Roman personal name Graec(i)us, meaning ‘Greek’ + the locative suffix -acum. This is probably the chief source of the surname in Britain.

English: nickname for someone with gray hair or a gray beard, from Middle English grey (Old English grǣg, grēg) ‘gray’. In Ireland it has been used as a translation of various Gaelic surnames derived from riabhach ‘brindled, gray’, including Mac Giolla Riabhaigh; see McGreevy . In North America, this surname has assimilated names with similar meaning from other languages.
French: habitational name from Gray in Haute-Saône or Le Gray in Seine-Maritime.

variants.name: Greiwe
meanings: German: possibly a nickname from Middle High German greibe ‘sharp, tangy, dour’. Compare Grey .

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: Lady Elizabeth Grey was born in 1470, in Sussex, England, United Kingdom as the daughter of Edward Grey 1st Viscount Lisle and Elizabeth TALBOT. She married Edmund Dudley Esq. about 1500, in Cumberland, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died in June 1525, at the age of 55, and was buried in Titchfield, Hampshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lady Elizabeth Grey est née en 1470, à Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fille d’Edward Grey 1st Viscount Lisle et Elizabeth TALBOT. Elle a épousé Edmund Dudley Esq. environ 1500, à Cumberland, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Elle est décédée en juin 1525, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterrée à Titchfield, Hampshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Lady Elizabeth Grey wurde 1470 in Sussex, England, United Kingdom, als Tochter von Edward Grey 1st Viscount Lisle und Elizabeth TALBOT geboren. Sie hat um 1500 in Cumberland, England Edmund Dudley Esq. geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb im Juni 1525 im Alter von 55 Jahren und wurde in Titchfield, Hampshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Lady Elizabeth Grey è nata il nel 1470 nel Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlia di Edward Grey 1st Viscount Lisle e Elizabeth TALBOT. Lei sposato Edmund Dudley Esq. circa 1500, nel Cumberland, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì nel giugno 1525, all'età di 55 anni, e fu sepolta a Titchfield, Hampshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Elizabeth Greyは1470年にイギリスイギリススセックスでEdward Grey 1st Viscount LisleとElizabeth TALBOTの娘として生まれた。約1500年にイギリスクウンバーランドでEdmund Dudley Esq.と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼女は1525年6月に55歳で死去し，イギリスハンプシュアイアティトチフィールドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Elizabeth Grey(은)는 1470년 영국 잉글랜드 수세스에서 Edward Grey 1st Viscount Lisle(와)과 Elizabeth TALBOT의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1500년 영국 c벌랜드에서 Edmund Dudley Esq.(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1525년 6월 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 함프실르 티트ch필드에 묻혔다.

mn.Kilkhampton, Cornwall-shire, England, Eu: Kylgh, Kernev, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Lady Elizabeth Grey nasceu em 1470, em Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filha de Edward Grey 1st Viscount Lisle e Elizabeth TALBOT. Ela casou-se com Edmund Dudley Esq. aproximadamente 1500, em Cumberland, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ela faleceu em junho de 1525, com 55 anos, e foi sepultada em Titchfield, Hampshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Lady Elizabeth Grey родилась в 1470 г. в местности суссекс, Англия, Великобритания. Её родителей звали Edward Grey 1st Viscount Lisle и Elizabeth TALBOT. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Edmund Dudley Esq. около 1500 г. в местности кумбирланд, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она умерла июнь 1525 г. в возрасте 55 лет и была похоронена в местности тичфиелд, хампшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Lady Elizabeth Grey nació en 1470, en Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido como hija de Edward Grey 1st Viscount Lisle y Elizabeth TALBOT. Se casó con Edmund Dudley Esq. aproximadamente 1500, en Cumberland, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió en junio de 1525, a la edad de 55 años, y fue sepultada en Titchfield, Hampshire, Inglaterra.
